broker-core/src/main/java/org/powertac/s.general_idea: Migrate JMS imports from javax.jms to jakarta.jms namespace.
broker-core/src/main/java/org/powertac/s.why_exists: javax.jms package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3 / Java 21 ecosystem); code fails to compile with 'package javax.jms does not exist'.

broker-core/src/main/java/org/powertac/s.general_idea: Remove unused import for Initializable interface.
Refactor instanceof check to use pattern matching for cleaner code.
Remove unused import for java.io.InputStreamReader
Remove unused import for org.apache.commons.configuration2.XMLConfiguration
Change log level from debug to info for setUserConfig message
Refactor application context initialization to use a static getter for lazy loading and external access.
Add support for a command-line option to specify a log file suffix.
Implement logic to parse and store the log-suffix command-line argument.
Update log file naming logic to include the optional suffix and conditional index.
Fix logger initialization to explicitly pass the class for correct category naming.
Migrate JMS and annotation imports from javax to jakarta namespace for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
broker-core/src/main/java/org/powertac/s.why_exists: javax.jms and javax.annotation packages are removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3 / Java 21 ecosystem), causing compile errors if not updated to jakarta.*.

broker-core/src/main/java/org/powertac/s.general_idea: Replace Joda-Time Instant import with Java 8+ java.time.Instant to align with JDK 21 standard library.
broker-core/src/main/java/org/powertac/s.why_exists: Compile error: class 'org.joda.time.Instant' cannot be found if Joda-Time dependency is removed or if the code is migrated to use standard Java Time API exclusively.

broker-core/src/main/java/org/powertac/s.general_idea: Replace Joda-Time Instant.plus(long) with java.time.Instant.plusMillis(long) for duration addition.
broker-core/src/main/java/org/powertac/s.why_exists: Compile error: method 'plus(long)' does not exist in class 'java.time.Instant'; must use 'plusMillis' or 'plus(Duration)'.

broker-core/src/main/java/org/powertac/s.why_exists: The Joda-Time library is being removed from the project dependencies; retaining the import would cause a compilation error due to the missing class.
